## Summary
<!-- What does this change? Why? -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist
- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (if user-visible)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Linked issue: closes #
